coreJobStatement: Manufacture and deliver qualified precision metal components that meet OEM dimensional, material, and performance specifications for integration into vehicle body, closure, seat, and drivetrain programs
outputTypes: Seat & Comfort Systems (seat rail tracks, headrest guide tubes, recline mechanism blanks)
Body Closure Systems (window regulator guide profiles, sill tracks, latch reinforcement profiles)
Body Structural Reinforcement (B-pillar insert profiles, sill reinforcement inserts, door impact beam blanks)
Drivetrain Profile Components (driveshaft section blanks, spline inserts, torque tube sections)
Chassis & Suspension Profiles (subframe cross-member sections, anti-roll bar blanks)
hierarchy: Product VN (L7 through L4) — what process steps and equipment compose the automotive component manufacturing chain
marketSize: ~$62B US (2017 census); global seat rail track long-slide segment $229M (2025) growing to $652M by 2034; window regulator segment ~$10-16B global (2024) [SRC: IBISWorld, Intel Market Research, Future Market Insights]

l6Systems.name: Incoming Material Qualification
l6Systems.jobFamily: Procure, qualify, and induct steel semi-finished forms to OEM material specification

l6Systems.name: Primary Forming
l6Systems.jobFamily: Transform raw/semi-finished stock into near-net-shape component geometry

l6Systems.name: Precision Secondary Machining
l6Systems.jobFamily: Machine, drill, mill, and grind components to OEM final dimensional specification

l6Systems.name: Surface & Thermal Engineering
l6Systems.jobFamily: Apply heat treatment and protective coating to meet service life and corrosion requirements

l6Systems.name: Sub-Assembly & Joining
l6Systems.jobFamily: Integrate component elements into shippable Tier 1 sub-assembly unit

l6Systems.name: PPAP, Testing & OEM Delivery
l6Systems.jobFamily: Validate against OEM drawing, obtain production part approval, deliver to assembly line

l6Systems.name: Quality Management (IATF 16949 / VDA 6.3)
l6Systems.jobFamily: Maintain IATF 16949 compliance, VDA 6.3 process audit, SPC monitoring across all core steps

l6Systems.name: APQP / Process Engineering
l6Systems.jobFamily: Advanced Product Quality Planning, PFMEA, control plan management across all core steps

l6Systems.name: JIT Supply Chain & Kanban
l6Systems.jobFamily: Just-in-time delivery management, Kanban replenishment, call-off scheduling

vnUnits.name: Precision Steel Profile Stock
vnUnits.functionalJob: Near-net-shape custom cold-drawn / cold-rolled profiles for seat tracks, guide rails, and shaft blanks. Reduces Tier 1 machining cost 40-80%. ZOLLERN PRIMARY POSITION. ~12% share at L6a.

vnUnits.name: Standard Round / Flat Bar Stock
vnUnits.functionalJob: Commodity round/flat bar machined to near-net at Tier 1. ~53% share. Sourced from Ovako, Bohler, Schmolz+Bickenbach.

vnUnits.name: Roll-Formed Structural Section
vnUnits.functionalJob: Open profile, non-precision roll-formed sections for structural inserts and chassis sections not requiring IT8 tolerance. ~25% share.

vnUnits.name: Drawn-Over-Mandrel Tube / Hollow Section
vnUnits.functionalJob: Seat back tubes, sill reinforcement hollow forms. ~10% share.

vnUnits.name: High-Strength Sheet Coil (AHSS)
vnUnits.functionalJob: Advanced high-strength steel DP/CP/TRIP coil for body stampings. ~60% share in sheet input.

vnUnits.name: Stamping Press Line
vnUnits.functionalJob: Progressive die stamping for sheet body parts. Dominant forming method at ~50% share.

vnUnits.name: Cold Roll-Forming Line
vnUnits.functionalJob: Multi-pass cold roll-forming mill for sill profiles, window guide tracks, and structural sections. ~75% share in roll-formed segment.

vnUnits.name: CNC Turning & Milling Center
vnUnits.functionalJob: Secondary machining of functional features on seat rail profiles, shaft blanks, and guide channel sections.

vnUnits.name: Induction Hardening Cell
vnUnits.functionalJob: Surface hardening of seat rail sliding surfaces and drivetrain journal diameters to 55-64 HRC.

vnUnits.name: Automated Assembly Cell
vnUnits.functionalJob: Integration of rail profiles with bearings, locking mechanisms, and mounting hardware into shippable seat rail or regulator assemblies.

vnUnits.name: CMM & SPC Station
vnUnits.functionalJob: Coordinate measurement machine for PPAP dimensional reports and ongoing SPC monitoring of Key Product Characteristics.

strategicPosition: ZOLLERN holds IATF 16949 certification and supplies precision cold-drawn profiles at IT8 tolerance (+-0.02 mm) with in-line induction hardening. Position at L5 under L6a Incoming Material Qualification. ~12% share of precision steel profile input.
